lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਹੈ ਦੁਖਦਾਈ ਮੋਹ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai sabh dukh hai dukhadaaee moh maae |
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, all is pain. Attachment to Maya is agonizingly painful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਦਰੀ ਆਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਸਭ ਜਾਇ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh nadaree aaeaa moh maaeaa vichhurr sabh jaae |17|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh comes to see, that attachment to Maya separates all from the Lord. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੰਨੇ ਸਹ ਕੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hukam mane seh keraa hukame hee sukh paae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh obeys the Order of her Husband Lord God; through the Hukam of His Command, she finds peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਜਿ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਬੁਝੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa suhaagan ji hukamai bujhai satigur sevai liv laae |
lines.english: She is always and forever the happy, pure soul-bride, who realizes His Will; she serves the True Guru, inspired by loving absorption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੋ ਸੇਵੇ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਅਰਾਧੇ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਸਮੈ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: hukamo seve hukam araadhe hukame samai samaae |
lines.english: In His Will, she serves; in His Will, she worship and adores Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਵਰਤੁ ਨੇਮੁ ਸੁਚ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: hukam varat nem such sanjam man chindiaa fal paae |
lines.english: In His Will, she merges in absorption. His Will is her fast, vow, purity and self-discipline; through it, she obtains the fruits of her mind's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਊਪਰਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak kripaa kare jin aoopar tinaa hukame le milaae |18|
lines.english: O Nanak, those upon whom the Lord showers His Mercy, are merged and immersed in His Will. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਬੁਝੇ ਬਪੁੜੀ ਨਿਤ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh hukam na bujhe bapurree nit haumai karam kamaae |
lines.english: The wretched, self-willed manmukhs do not realize His Will; they continually act in ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਤ ਨੇਮੁ ਸੁਚ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਪੂਜਾ ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: varat nem such sanjam poojaa paakhandd bharam na jaae |
lines.english: By ritualistic fasts, vows, purities, self-disciplines and worship ceremonies, they still cannot get rid of their hypocrisy and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਹੁ ਕੁਸੁਧੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਬੇਧੇ ਜਿਉ ਹਸਤੀ ਛਾਰੁ ਉਡਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: antarahu kusudh maaeaa mohi bedhe jiau hasatee chhaar uddaae |
lines.english: Inwardly, they are impure, pierced through by attachment to Maya; they are like elephants, who throw dirt all over themselves right after their bath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਤਿਸੈ ਨ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਚੇਤੇ ਕਿਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jin upaae tisai na cheteh bin chete kiau sukh paae |
lines.english: They do not even think of the One who created them. Without thinking of Him, they cannot find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਰਪੰਚੁ ਕੀਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਏ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak parapanch keea dhur karatai poorab likhiaa kamaae |19|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Primal Creator has made the drama of the Universe; all act as they are pre-ordained. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਭਈ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਤ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh parateet bhee man maaniaa anadin sevaa karat samaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh has faith; his mind is contented and satisfied. Night and day, he serves the Lord, absorbed in Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਭ ਪੂਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਦਰਸੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਸਭ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar satigur guroo sabh pooje satigur kaa daras dekhai sabh aae |
lines.english: The Guru, the True Guru, is within; all worship and adore Him. Everyone comes to see the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਨੀਐ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਰਮ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਸਭ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maneeai satigur param beechaaree jit miliai tisanaa bhukh sabh jaae |
lines.english: So believe in the True Guru, the supreme sublime Contemplator. Meeting with Him, hunger and thirst are completely relieved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਮੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਚਾ ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਗੇ ਆਇ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak karam paaeaa tin sachaa jo gur charanee lage aae |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who come and fall at the Feet of the Guru are blessed with the karma of Truth. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਚਾ ਦੇਇ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hau sadaa sadaa balihaaree gur apune jo prabh sachaa dee milaae |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to my Guru, who leads me to meet the True Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਪਿਰੀਆ ਸਉ ਨੇਹੁ ਸੇ ਸਜਣ ਮੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin pireea sau nehu se sajan mai naal |
lines.english: That Beloved, with whom I am in love, that Friend of mine is with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਹਉ ਫਿਰਾਂ ਭੀ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਖਾ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: antar baahar hau firaan bhee hiradai rakhaa samaal |21|
lines.english: I wander around inside and outside, but I always keep Him enshrined within my heart. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕ ਚਿਤਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa ik man ik chit dhiaaeaa satigur sau chit laae |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Lord single-mindedly, with one-pointed concentration, link their consciousness to the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਦੁਖ ਭੁਖ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਡਾ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਇਆ ਨਿਰਦੋਖ ਭਏ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee dukh bhukh haumai vaddaa rog geaa niradokh bhe liv laae |
lines.english: They are rid of pain, hunger, and the great illness of egotism; lovingly attuned to the Lord, they become free of pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਸਵੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaaveh gun uchareh gun meh savai samaae |
lines.english: They sing His Praises, and chant His Praises; in His Glorious Praises, they sleep in absorption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਇ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naanak gur poore te paaeaa sehaj miliaa prabh aae |22|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Perfect Guru, they come to meet God with intuitive peace and poise. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh maaeaa mohu hai naam na lagai piaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are emotionally attached to Maya; they are not in love with the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਕੂੜੁ ਸੰਘਰੈ ਕੂੜਿ ਕਰੈ ਆਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kamaavai koorr sangharai koorr karai aahaar |
lines.english: They practice falsehood, gather falsehood, and eat the food of falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਸਭੁ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bikh maaeaa dhan sanch mareh ant hoe sabh chhaar |
lines.english: Gathering the poisonous wealth and property of Maya, they die; in the end, they are all reduced to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਸੁਚਿ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam such sanjam kareh antar lobh vikaar |
lines.english: They perform religious rituals of purity and self-discipline, but they are filled with greed, evil and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਜਿ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਵੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: naanak manamukh ji kamaavai su thaae na pavai daragah hoe khuaar |23|
lines.english: O Nanak, the actions of the self-willed manmukhs are not accepted; in the Court of the Lord, they are miserable. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਰਾਗਾਂ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੋ ਭਲਾ ਭਾਈ ਜਿਤੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa raagaan vich so bhalaa bhaaee jit vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: Among all Ragas, that one is sublime, O Siblings of Destiny, by which the Lord comes to abide in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੈ ਨਾਦੈ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਇਨੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਬੂਝਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: raagai naadai baaharaa inee hukam na boojhiaa jaae |
lines.english: Those Ragas which are not in the Sound-current of the Naad - by these, the Lord's Will cannot be understood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਨਾਦੁ ਸਭੁ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: raag naad sabh sach hai keemat kahee na jaae |
lines.english: Those Ragas which are in the Sound-current of the Naad are totally true; their value cannot be expressed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਤਿਨਾ ਰਾਸਿ ਹੋਇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak hukamai boojhai tinaa raas hoe satigur te sojhee paae |
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone are right, who understand the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਹੋਇਆ ਜਿਉ ਤਿਸੈ ਦੀ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh tis te hoeaa jiau tisai dee rajaae |24|
lines.english: Everything happens as He wills. ||24||
